text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! We're excited to have you join as a moderator. Please review the community guidelines and let us know if you have any questions.
Welcome guide_sam! We're glad to have you as an event helper. Check out the upcoming events channel and feel free to introduce yourself!
Welcome mentor_lina! We're thrilled to have you join as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our community members.
